title: Stripe Tax
excerpt: Automate sales tax, VAT, and GST compliance on all your transactions. Calculate and report tax on all payments, even those that you process outside of Stripe. [Learn more](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/payment-intent/custom.md) [How Stripe Tax works](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/how-tax-works.md): Learn how Stripe Tax helps you automate tax compliance. [How Stripe calculates tax](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/calculating.md): Learn how Stripe Tax calculates tax on transactions. [Supported countries](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/supported-countries.md): See which countries Stripe Tax supports, and learn about tax calculation and collection in each region.
